data.desc:
- stay at home, play sports, learn English, watch TV

data.title: Unit 2B: Yesterday - Lesson 2: I cleaned my house and cooked dinner last night.
data.desc:
- Review words in L1
- clean my house, visit my grandparents, cook dinner, wash dishes, chat with friends (minh hoạ cụm từ này bằng h/a các b nhỏ đang nói chuyện thân mật trực tiếp với nhau, không nên

data.title: Unit 2B: Yesterday - Lesson 3: What did he do yesterday?
data.desc:
- Review words in L2
- do my homework, go to school, make a cake, have dinner with friends
- What did he/she do yesterday/ last night? 
He/She went to school (and did his/her homework) yesterday/ last

data.title: Unit 2B: Yesterday - Lesson 4: She went to school and did her homework yesterday.
data.desc:
- Review words in L3 (+1 số từ ở L1,2)
- What did he/she do yesterday/ last night? 
He/She went to school (and did his/her homework) yesterday/ last night.
- Did he/she clean his/her house last night?

data.title: Unit 2B: Yesterday - Lesson 5: Did you clean your house last night?
data.desc:
- Review (các từ còn lại + các irregular Vs)
- Culture/ value/...
- What did you do yesterday/ last night?
I cleaned my house (and cooked dinner) yesterday/ last night.
- Did you clean your house last
